RAISE_SKELETON.name: Raise Skeleton
RAISE_SKELETON.description: Consume a corpse to summon a skeleton warrior.

RECALL_SKELETON.name: Recall Skeleton
RECALL_SKELETON.description: Revert a skeleton warrior back into mana.

FOCUS_FIRE.name: Mark of Death
FOCUS_FIRE.description: Minions prioritize attacking the marked target.

CORPSE_EXPLOSION.name: Corpse Explosion
CORPSE_EXPLOSION.description: Detonate a corpse to deal area-of-effect damage.

SOUL_HARVEST.name: Soul Harvest
SOUL_HARVEST.description: Extract essence from a corpse to restore mana.

SOUL_TRANSFER.name: Soul Transfer
SOUL_TRANSFER.description: Transfers the necromancer's health to a minion.

BONE_PRISON.name: Bone Prison
BONE_PRISON.description: Restricts target movement using bone structures.

BONE_STORM.name: Bone Storm
BONE_STORM.description: Sacrifice all skeletons to deal massive AOE damage proportional to their total HP.

passive.death_aura: [!] {{attacker}}'s Death Aura begins to constrict the souls of the enemies...
passive.death_destruct: [🔥 Doomsday]: {{unit}}'s corpse explodes, consuming everything around it!

special.self_destruct: 💀 {{attacker}} has expended all their strength and perished!
special.health_drain: 💉 {{attacker}} absorbed the enemy's life force, recovering {{amount}} HP!

item_steal.item: [!] Lost Item! {{attacker}} snatched '{{item}}' from your bag and fled!
item_steal.fail: > {{attacker}} searched your pockets, but found absolutely nothing.

target_not_found: But no target could be found..

buff.overdrive: [🔥 Overdrive] {{name}}'s soul is forced into a frenzy, pushing its power to the limit! ({{name}} HP {{hp}} / {{maxHp}})

debuff.bleed: [!] {{name}} has sustained a deep wound and begins to bleed!
debuff.burn: [!] {{name}}'s skin is scorched by the flames.
debuff.poison: [!] {{name}} is exposed to a lethal toxin, turning pale.
debuff.freeze: [!] {{name}} is exposed to the cold, and their skin begins to freeze.
debuff.curse: [!] {{name}}'s guard is shattered by uncontrollable rage!
debuff.bone_prison: [!] Jagged bone bars rise, constricting {{name}}'s limbs!
debuff.aging: [⏳] {{name}}'s skin withers rapidly as they gasp for air! All reactions are visibly slowed.
debuff.injury: [⏳] {{name}}'s ankle is injured! Movement is visibly slowed.

fire_bolt.name: Fire Bolt
fire_bolt.description: Shoots a flame at the target, inflicting a burn.

ice_bolt.name: Ice Bolt
ice_bolt.description: Shoots ice at the target, slowing their actions.

lightning_bolt.name: Lightning Bolt
lightning_bolt.description: Shoots lightning at the target, paralyzing them.

fire_breath.name: Fire Breath
fire_breath.description: Exhales a powerful blast of fire in all directions.

quick_slash.name: Surprise Strike
quick_slash.description: Quickly slashes the enemy's weak point with a keen weapon or sharp claws.

sticky_web.name: Force Restraint
sticky_web.description: Throws sticky mucus or invisible magical threads to restrict the target's movement.

self_destruct.name: Unstable Self-Destruction
self_destruct.description: Causes internal energy to go berserk and scatters the body to deal fatal damage to nearby enemies.

health_drain.name: Life Drain
health_drain.description: Clings to the target and directly absorbs their life energy for sustenance.

power_smash.name: Power Smash
power_smash.description: Smashes the enemy with a heavy weapon.

power_shot.name: Power Shot
power_shot.description: Fires a powerful projectile targeting the enemy's vitals.

aim_arrow.name: Snipe
aim_arrow.description: Snipes the enemy in the backline.

piercing_arrow.name: Piercing Shot
piercing_arrow.description: Pierces through the frontline to hit the enemies behind.

rapid_fire.name: Barrage
rapid_fire.description: Unleashes indiscriminate fire on the battlefield, damaging all enemies.

minor_heal.name: Lesser Heal
minor_heal.description: Slightly restores HP to the most wounded ally.

heal.name: Heal
heal.description: Restores HP to the most wounded ally.

greater_heal.name: Greater Heal
greater_heal.description: Greatly restores HP to the most wounded ally.

volley_fire.name: Volley Fire
volley_fire.description: Rains down a shower of arrows on all enemies.

holy_radiance.name: Holy Chorus
holy_radiance.description: Soothes the wounds of all allies.

bone_prison.name: Bone Prison
bone_prison.description: A prison made of bone restricts the target's actions.

aging_curse.name: Enfeeble
aging_curse.description: Curses the most wounded enemy with aging, reducing their Agility.

abyssal_gallop.name: Abyssal Gallop
abyssal_gallop.description: Abyssal flames erupt in the warhorse's wake, dealing fixed damage to all enemies.

dread_charge.name: Death Charge
dread_charge.description: Becomes one with the warhorse to pierce the enemy lines, dealing heavy physical damage to all enemies.

divide_soul.name: Self-Division
divide_soul.description: Spirits clinging to the body break away.

achilles_bite.name: Achilles Bite
achilles_bite.description: Precisely targets and bites the ankle, significantly reducing Move Speed and Evasion as teeth tear into ligaments.

call_reinforcements.name: Call Guard
call_reinforcements.description: Sounds a high-frequency alarm, drawing nearby security forces to this area.

call_reinforcements2.name: Call Guard
call_reinforcements2.description: Sounds a high-frequency alarm, drawing nearby security forces to this area.

call_reinforcements3.name: Call Guard
call_reinforcements3.description: Sounds a high-frequency alarm, drawing nearby security forces to this area.

stealth.name: Stealth
stealth.description: Hides within shadows and cargo piles; cannot be targeted until appearing to attack again.

item_steal.name: Pickpocket
item_steal.description: The plunderer's quick hands brush your bag, snatching consumables or gold.

enemy_curse.name: Taunt
enemy_curse.description: Hurls insults at all enemies to reduce their Defense.

smoke_bomb.name: Smoke Screen
smoke_bomb.description: Explodes thick grey smoke at the feet, blocking vision and causing Accuracy to plummet.

poison_dagger.name: Poison Stab
poison_dagger.description: Throws a dagger coated in purple venom that drains the target's life every turn.

vitals_strike.name: Vitals Strike
vitals_strike.description: Infiltrates the most vulnerable enemy's opening to deal a critical melee blow.

whirlwind.name: Whirlwind
whirlwind.description: Swings the weapon in a wide arc to attack all nearby enemies and inflicts Bleed for 3 turns.

thorns.name: Thorns
thorns.description: Returns a portion of the damage taken back to the attacker.

death_aura.name: Death Aura
death_aura.description: Withers all life within range, reducing Defense and HP of enemies each turn.

death_destruct.name: Doomsday
death_destruct.description: Upon death, explodes to deal 60% of this unit's HP as damage to all enemies.

frostborne.name: Frostborne
frostborne.description: Slows the enemy unit's actions upon attacking.

distortion_shroud.name: Spatial Distortion: Fading Afterimage
distortion_shroud.description: Hides within the crevices of sub-space.

soul_anchor.name: Nether Anchor: Soul Isolation
soul_anchor.description: Tears a hole into sub-space beneath an enemy to seize their soul.

dimensional_collapse.name: Dimensional Collapse: Closing Boundary
dimensional_collapse.description: Compresses and destroys the space of the entire battlefield.

spectral_wail.name: Spectral Wail
spectral_wail.description: Unleashes a scream filled with noble resentment, shattering the minds of all enemies.

spout_out.name: Eruption
spout_out.description: Boiling filth from the pit of sin sweeps over the target.
